texto: The meaning of life is not to be discovered only after death in some hidden, mysterious realm; on the contrary, it can be found by eating the succulent fruit of the Tree of Life and by living in the here and now as fully and creatively as we can.
explicacao: Citação de Paul Kurtz sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The meaning of life is not to be discovered only after death in some hidden, mysterious realm; on…” articula vida, tree, fruit em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como luto e tree.
